mapper.select: select * from jsh_print_template where bill_type = #{billType} and is_default = '1' and ifnull(delete_flag, '0') != '1' limit 1

select id, bill_type, template_name, template_html, is_default, create_time, update_time from jsh_print_template where bill_type = #{billType} and ifnull(delete_flag, '0') != '1' order by is_default desc, update_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into jsh_print_template (bill_type, template_name, template_html, is_default, delete_flag, create_time, update_time) values (#{billType}, #{templateName}, #{templateHtml}, #{isDefault}, '0', now(), now())
mapper.update: update jsh_print_template set template_name = #{templateName}, template_html = #{templateHtml}, is_default = #{isDefault}, update_time = now() where id = #{id} and ifnull(delete_flag, '0') != '1'
